content: cf-support  Table of contents cf-support gathers various details about the system and creates a tarball in the current directory to submit to support. If the system is an enterprise hub then additional details will be gathered and included. The utility will prompt for an optional support ticket number as well as prompt whether to include masterfiles in the tarball. Command reference code --yes, -y - Non-interactive use. Assume no ticket number and assume include masterfiles. --help, -h - Print the help message History Introduced in 3.21.0, 3.18.3
title: cf-support
